title: Airmepad
abstract: The AirMePad small design makes it easy and affordable to provide quick and easy air to the face or air to push partials away from the eyes and nose to help improve breathing cleaner air. It also provides simple and quick LED lighting to help reading at night or in dark places or moving around just by the touch of your fingers. The design of the AirMePad is used to attach under the front of hats (ex: baseball, golfers caps, construction workers, etc.) and blow air downwards toward the face. It can also be used on auto visors, computer monitors, and other objects to help blow air and provide lighting. This unique design and easy availability could also help people with allergies, weak immune systems, breathing disorders, and other health issues to provide a "Breath Healthy" llife style.
claims: Claims Claims of the Invention AirMePad is unique in the fact it can provide quick and easy air to the face or air to push partials away from the eyes and nose to help improve cleaner air intake to the body.
